Avoid it : @Data 

This annotation is a compilation of the @Getter, @Setter, @RequiredArgsConstructor, @ToString and@EqualsAndHashCode annotations all together now. I believe it’s better if we put them all explicitly. First, because it helps code to not expose unnecessary things, second reading and third, because it gives you the flexibility to add and remove annotations when needed.

Class name can be NcmpServiceCmHandlerState or more suitable as the main idea is to maintain the state of  NcmpServiceCmHandler to allow the object for changing its behavior without changing its class.
